query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A pair of white and grey New Balance cycling shoes with black laces rests on a blue fabric surface next to a yellow Giro cycling helmet, dark sunglasses, and red cycling gloves.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A harsh flash photograph captures a pair of visibly worn and dirty white and grey New Balance cycling shoes with black laces resting on a blue fabric surface, alongside a yellow Giro cycling helmet, dark sunglasses, and red cycling gloves, showing hard shadows, bright specular highlights, and accumulated grime and scuff marks from extended use.
